note: Figma MCP (use_figma / get_metadata / get_screenshot via the Figma plugin server) was confirmed working in this session and used to inspect and mutate the file directly, across three build passes in one continuous session. The file already contained a substantial pre-existing design system (20 pages, 4 variable collections with Light+High Contrast modes, 6 text styles, 2 effect styles, and 6 Component Sets) that prior GAP_REPORT entries had incorrectly described as never built. Pass 1: added 8 Component Sets (Checkbox/Radio/Select/Tag/Pagination Item/Breadcrumb Item/Spinner/Toast), reconciled color/action/primary(-hover) to the code brand, built the first real instance-composed Basic Pattern board. Pass 2: added a PG ERD Icon set, a real Login Flow, and upgraded the Core Flow's visual-only connectors to real setReactionsAsync prototype connections. Pass 3: traversed real KRDS pages via WebFetch and confirmed the repo's scoping was accurate; added 8 more Component Sets including the two explicitly required by the completion criteria (generic Modal, Header) plus Footer/Tab/Snackbar/Text Area/Link/Tooltip; built 2 more real pattern boards (확인/목록 탐색); rebuilt the Accessibility Lab around 7 real UI objects instead of checklist text; added a KRDS Source Inventory table. Also found and fixed a real Figma Plugin API gotcha (shared TEXT property defaults across variants in one Component Set) that had silently produced wrong instance text in two of this session's own pattern boards before being caught. All additions verified with get_screenshot after creation. See docs/GAP_REPORT.md for what remains open.
